text:
05/09/2025, 15:01
How FlexBeam Works Using Red Light Therapy Principles – Recharge FlexBeam is ergonomically designed to enable more effective and targeted therapy. The unique design of FlexBeam allows light to penetrate deep into difficult-to- reach areas of the body – such as the knee and shoulder joint – which is impossible with flat light panels. Because FlexBeam is designed to be worn on the skin, each session yields a consistent dose and is not dependent on distance from the light source. This means less power is needed to deliver energy directly to the affected site. In turn, this reduces treatment time, making it possible to deliver a targeted therapeutic dose in 10 minutes for a single placement. Inspired by Nature FlexBeam delivers biocompatible dosing for optimal natural stimulation of red light energy. Waves In nature, most signaling is rhythmical and cyclical. The wave pattern is everywhere, from sunset to sunrise to brain patterns to how we experience pain – it comes and goes like waves in the sea. In FlexBeam, frequency, and power output increase in a steady wave-like fashion and ramp down at the end of the cycle. Pulsing The body pulses naturally. Heart rate variability (HRV) is a pulsating indication of our health condition, muscles are controlled with electrical impulses. The Earth itself pulses at around 7.8Hz. FlexBeam operates on specific pulsed frequencies to harmonize with nature. https://support.recharge.health/hc/en-us/articles/900006261666-How-FlexBeam-Works-Using-Red-Light-Therapy-Principles

text:
05/09/2025, 15:01
How FlexBeam Works Using Red Light Therapy Principles – Recharge Synergistic Wavelengths FlexBeam uses both redlight at 610-650nm and near-infrared between 800-850nm in a combined composition that sweeps through frequencies for optimal effect. This combination of red and near-infrared wavelengths, along with the high power output tuned to natural frequencies, sets the unique technology inside FlexBeam apart from any other red light therapy device. Ingeniously designed for the optimal physiological response, the result is a powerful healing experience that feels as good for your body as a glorious sunrise and a glowing sunset. Learn How to Use Your FlexBeam and discover what it can help you with.
